description_long: This is a modern, multi-functional wooden desk and shelving unit, featuring a dark wood grain finish with a combination of open shelves, a spacious desktop, and a set of three drawers on the right side. The left side includes a vertical panel with a lighter-colored accent, likely a cabinet door or panel, and a curved upper shelf that adds visual interest and extra storage space. The upper section has two open shelves supported by vertical dividers, ideal for books or decorative items. The main desktop surface is wide and slightly curved, providing ample workspace, while the lower right section houses three drawers with metallic handles for organized storage. The overall design is practical and stylish, suitable for use in offices, home workspaces, or reception areas. The construction appears sturdy, with visible fasteners and a solid base for stability.
description: A dark wood grain desk and shelving unit with open shelves, a curved desktop, and three drawers with metallic handles. Features a lighter accent panel and a modern, practical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelving, main desktop, lighter accent panel, and the three drawers on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved profile and the depth of the shelving and desktop surfaces.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the arrangement of shelves, the curved desktop, and the drawer layout.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the curvature of the drawers and the layered structure of the desk and shelves.
